relatedBlades.title: Enhancing cyber resilience and modernization for the Australian Government
relatedBlades.copy:
Australian Government agencies face the dual challenge of driving IT modernisation while confronting an escalating wave of sophisticated cyber threats. The imperative to deliver resilient digital services for citizens is often hindered by fragmented IT environments, resource constraints, and the increasing capabilities of threat actors targeting national security and critical infrastructure.

This whitepaper explores a pathway for Australian federal, state, and local agencies to enhance operational and cyber resilience. Discover how to:

- __Protect__ your agency by mitigating advanced cyber threats and maturing Zero Trust architectures.
- __Connect__ and enhance digital service performance by modernizing applications and networks to boost workforce productivity.
- __Accelerate__ modernsation and operational efficiency, helping to reduce costs, complexity, and technology debt.

Learn how Cloudflare's unified platform of security and connectivity services, assessed at the IRAP PROTECTED level, can help your agency consolidate security solutions, reduce risk, and securely deliver on strategic objectives.

![Australian public sector image](//cf-assets.www.cloudflare.com/slt3lc6tev37/1T6l7mdYjqu4NEahKl2dXb/00fd7f24daed76fdd76b420da5877363/australian-public-sector.png)
